description_long: This is a medium-sized, arched wooden barrel with a weathered, rustic appearance, featuring a series of wide, gray metallic bands that reinforce its structure. The wood planks are vertically aligned and show visible grain, knots, and some discoloration, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The metallic bands are evenly spaced and wrap over the curved top, providing both structural support and a decorative accent. The front face has a rectangular section with two small, metallic latch-like details, possibly for securing a lid. The ends of the barrel are semi-circular, with the wood grain and knots clearly visible, and the metallic bands continuing over the top. There are no visible handles or spouts, and the overall construction appears robust, suitable for storage or decorative use in an urban environment.
description: A weathered, arched wooden barrel reinforced with wide gray metallic bands and visible wood grain, featuring latch details on the front. The rustic design suggests durability and urban outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular face with two metallic latch details and the curved top with three wide metallic bands.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the semi-circular end, vertical wood planks, and the continuation of the metallic bands over the arch.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back panel of wood planks, metallic hinges, and the arched metallic bands.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a semi-circular end, visible wood knots, and a slight gap at the base, showing the banding structure.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: wide gray metal hoops over top and sides
